name: Nairobi
industries: Regional corporate headquarters, the development sector and the Silicon Savannah tech ecosystem all hire certified delivery talent.
intro: Nairobi wears three hats at once: East Africa's commercial capital, the global development sector's African headquarters, and Silicon Savannah — the continent's most storied tech ecosystem. Each hat hires certified project talent. Regional multinationals run their African programmes from Upper Hill and Westlands; UN agencies and NGOs specify PMP-style credentials in procurement; and the fintech scene that gave the world M-PESA hires Scrum-credentialed delivery leads. Our live online weekend batch converts the IST schedule to 6:30 AM – 3:30 PM Nairobi time — a full workshop by mid-afternoon, both days. You train in English with an international cohort, with invoices suited to employer or donor funding. Afterwards: exam application guidance, full-length mocks, and trainer access until you're certified. Donor-funded participants can request documentation formatted for agency procurement rules.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Nairobi?
faq.a: Our current batches follow the Asia schedule: 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which converts to 06:30 AM – 03:30 PM EAT in Nairobi. You are welcome to join at those hours, or register interest and we will notify you first when batches in your region's hours are scheduled.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Nairobi?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Nairobi. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Kenya?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Kenya and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Nairobi sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Kenya accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Nairobi — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Nairobi: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
